signals.headline: Iran Signals Intent to Resume Peace Talks with US, Triggering Crypto Surge** | **YES** | **HIGH**
signals.raw:
Iran Signals Intent to Resume Peace Talks with US, Triggering Crypto Surge** | **YES** | **HIGH**  
Bitcoin broke above $75,000 (up 5.9%), Ethereum surged 8.6% to $2,377 with 41% higher on-chain activity and positive ETF flows, and XRP rose 4.2% to $1.38, ending a month of Middle East war pressure.[1][4]
